input.old_string:
Timezone **America/Denver (MT)**. Designed so the week needs **6 home-cooked dinners** with
four different "who's out" patterns:

| Date | Day | Event | Dinner impact |
|------|-----|-------|---------------|
| 2026-07-14 | Tue | Jordan — client work dinner (6:30–9pm) | Jordan out → cook for 3 |
| 2026-07-15 | Wed | Mateo — soccer practice (5:00–6:30pm) | all home but **busy/late** → quick meal |
| 2026-07-16 | Thu | Priya traveling — Chicago (all day) | Priya out → cook for 3 |
| 2026-07-17 | Fri | Priya traveling — returns late (all day) | Priya out → cook for 3 |
| 2026-07-17 | Fri | Ana — ballet (4:00–5:00pm) | minor; still cook |
| 2026-07-18 | Sat | Dinner at Grandma's (5:30–8pm) | **everyone out → no cooking** |
